name_en: 📣📣📣 【Original leather paired with 🌈 (Cdfmall Sanya Duty-Free Shop Tote Bag】🔥🔥 Padlock✨ Black and Monogram Splicing, retro and classic! This is also the bag king in my heart. Even with so many new models, it stands firm in the counter, and is often out of stock! It looks ordinary at first glance, but the more you look, the better it looks. It is definitely a type that gets better with time, very classic and versatile! No need to worry about capacity, daily essentials can be stored~
